Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Hansin]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Hansin is an old friend of Shera who served twenty years as an undercover Mason guarding the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Hansin is a character who provides gossip.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Hansin is Lucan's regular guard and a Consultant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Hansin is a Mason guard who watches over Lucan.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Hansin is a Mason who worked as a guard and wears an armored uniform.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Hansin was found unconscious.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Hansin is a guard who was previously guarding a different cell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Hansin's neck is stinging.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — Hansin is a guard on Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — Hansin is someone Shera expects to see on her shift.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Hansin is a Mason guard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Hansin is an individual who shoved a guard and accompanied Shera.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
